mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO dept_daily_fill_state ( tenant_id, dept_id, office_id, employee_type, module, year, month, ym, user_id, status, last_calc_time, create_by, create_time, create_dept, update_by, update_time ) VALUES
( #{it.tenantId}, #{it.deptId}, #{it.officeId}, #{it.employeeType}, #{it.module}, #{it.year}, #{it.month}, #{it.ym}, #{it.userId}, #{it.status}, #{it.lastCalcTime}, #{it.createBy}, #{it.createTime}, #{it.createDept}, #{it.updateBy}, #{it.updateTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE dept_id = VALUES(dept_id), office_id = VALUES(office_id), employee_type = VALUES(employee_type), status = VALUES(status), last_calc_time = VALUES(last_calc_time), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
